node.text: 16-19 JULY 2026, BANFFY CASTLE, CLUJ, ROMANIA | ELECTRIC CASTLE
16-19 July 2026, Banffy Castle, Cluj, Romania | Electric Castle

We use first-party and third-party cookies to understand how our website and online store is used and to be able to improve it, tailor content to your preferences, and personalize ads, marketing content, and social media advertising. You can accept all cookies, reject them or choose the desired configuration by clicking on the corresponding buttons. Note that rejecting cookies may affect your experience on the website. For more information, you can consult the
Going to Electric Castle is easy
The festival takes place in Bontida, 25 km from Cluj-Napoca.
from Cluj to the festival and back.
(40 min for the whole trip, from CJ to the festival).
All national trains will stop in Bonțida during the festival.
Still, we recommend the public transport.

node.content-desc: Electric Castle is loved by 250.000+ people every year for its unique and immersive 4 day & 24/7 experience, awarded by the music festival industry for its relentless quality and appreciated by thousands of artists worldwide.

Electric Castle is loved by 250.000+ people every year for its unique and immersive 4 day & 24/7 experience, awarded by the music festival industry for its relentless quality and appreciated by thousands of artists worldwide.

Taking place next to the iconic 15th-century Bánffy Castle, at the heart of Transylvania, Electric Castle surprises at every edition with a diverse lineup, of more than 250 local & international artists, touching a mix of genres, with new media installations & performances and disruptive talks.

Taking place next to the iconic 15th-century Bánffy Castle, at the heart of Transylvania, Electric Castle surprises at every edition with a diverse lineup, of more than 250 local & international artists, touching a mix of genres, with new media installations & performances and disruptive talks.

node.text: Electric Castle is loved by 250.000+ people every year for its unique and immersive 4 day & 24/7 experience, awarded by the music festival industry for its relentless quality and appreciated by thousands of artists worldwide.

Taking place next to the iconic 15th-century Bánffy Castle, at the heart of Transylvania, Electric Castle surprises at every edition with a diverse lineup, of more than 250 local & international artists, touching a mix of genres, with new media installations & performances and disruptive talks.
With one of Europe's best festival campings, EC Village is a temporary home for a community that returns each year for a memorable adventure.
Plan your days, find your stages, and stay updated in real time. The Electric Castle app keeps everything in one place, so you never miss what matters.
We’ll meet in July, but until then, you can be the first to find out all the latest news by subscribing to our newsletter.

That’s why when the party is over, the only footprint left behind has to be a positive one. At Electric Castle, we believe that sustainability shouldn’t be a one-hit wonder but an all-timer. Our efforts are sustained and constant for each edition to be more environmentally friendly.
. Copyright © SC Electricity Project SRL, CUI: 50360413, Reg. Com.: J12/3193/2024
